title: Scroll Optimization Workstream v1
problem: Keep scroll extent probing, deferred unbounded probes, and post-layout overflow observation coherent so scroll surfaces stay correct and smooth under resize, invalidation, view-cache reuse, and edge growth/shrink.

repro.summary: Resume this lane from the current seed/authority and ecosystem live-node/declarative-semantics gates before profiling demo surfaces.
commands: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-codex-ui cargo nextest run -p fret-ui-kit apply_initial_focus_prefers_explicit_element resolve_restore_focus_prefers_trigger_and_falls_back_to_live_node resolve_restore_focus_skips_non_focusable_trigger resolve_branch_nodes_dedupes_and_preserves_order active_descendant_is_set_when_active_item_is_present_and_cleared_when_missing apply_initial_focus_ignores_removed_element_with_only_last_known_mapping resolve_branch_nodes_ignores_removed_trigger_with_only_last_known_mapping active_descendant_helper_ignores_removed_element_with_only_last_known_mapping table_active_descendant_semantics_resolves_from_declarative_active_row_relation --status-level fail

gates.name: ecosystem-live-node-public-surface
gates.command: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target-codex-ui cargo nextest run -p fret-ui-kit apply_initial_focus_prefers_explicit_element resolve_restore_focus_prefers_trigger_and_falls_back_to_live_node resolve_restore_focus_skips_non_focusable_trigger resolve_branch_nodes_dedupes_and_preserves_order active_descendant_is_set_when_active_item_is_present_and_cleared_when_missing apply_initial_focus_ignores_removed_element_with_only_last_known_mapping resolve_branch_nodes_ignores_removed_trigger_with_only_last_known_mapping active_descendant_helper_ignores_removed_element_with_only_last_known_mapping table_active_descendant_semantics_resolves_from_declarative_active_row_relation --status-level fail

continue_policy.notes: Continue this lane for mechanism-level scroll extent, deferred probe, and observation work. Start a narrower follow-on only if the seed/authority contract must be generalized beyond scroll surfaces.
